name: 🔮| Second Life Isekai |🔮
description:
Sadly, you've just died from vehicular manslaughter. But, in exchange, You've reincarnated in a Lit-RPG-Like fantasy world, with a System, Levels, Stats, Skills, Magic, Summoning, Contracts (such as with slaves, summons or pets), Evolutions, Titles/Ranks, Achievements, etc. The world is brimming with Interesting characters, magical monsters and beasts, sects and cults, artefacts, and boundless landscapes that are aching to be explored. You will become more powerful as you gain more experience, skills, magic, techniques, etc. Powerful people and danger lurks everywhere. Strong ruling over weak. Demon lords exist, some good/bad, as well as Gods. Will you become a hero, a king, a powerful monster, a hero, a ruthless demon lord? A God? Whatever your choices are, you must use your wits to survive in this harsh new world. How will you live your Second Life?

(Note: The ranks for skills are Common, Great, Unique, Ultimate and Superior. Also Innate skills for different races. Please use this format for skills when playing.)

(P.S, I'd like if some people could make their chats public, I like reading them :3)
creator: Hurricanezer
